user_prompt: Analyse this sales data and create a Word report for leadership

source_data_summary.ground_truth: No planted anomaly. Organic outliers present: South/Product_B Mar (z=-2.84), South/Product_E Aug (z=-2.94), North/Product_B Nov (z=+2.36), North/Product_C Dec (z=+2.36), South/Product_D Jul (z=+2.06)

agent_plan: Preparing to analyze data. Planning to read the Excel file, compute key metrics, and create a Word report summarising insights, trends, and recommendations for leadership.

steps.output: 216 rows × 5 columns loaded. All expected columns present. Month_Num mapping applied. Dtypes correct.

Total revenue 8,333,861. Best month Nov (749,317), worst month Mar (642,741). North leads regions (35.4%). Product_A leads products (20.1%). Q4 strongest quarter +5.8% QoQ. H2 up 7.2% vs H1. Z-score outliers detected: South/Product_B Mar (z=-2.84), South/Product_E Aug (z=-2.94), North/Product_B Nov (z=+2.36), North/Product_C Dec (z=+2.36), South/Product_D Jul (z=+2.06). March dip root cause: South/Product_B largest negative contributor (-11,655 revenue).
key_facts_produced: anomalies_detected: [South/Product_B Mar z=-2.84, South/Product_E Aug z=-2.94, North/Product_B Nov z=+2.36, North/Product_C Dec z=+2.36, South/Product_D Jul z=+2.06]

steps.output: 4 chart PNGs saved. KeyError on Month_Num in outliers sort — self-corrected, added Month_Num mapping to outliers_df, re-ran successfully. All aggregates, anomaly list, and charts passed into Word script.
key_facts_produced: anomaly_list_passed: [South/Product_B Mar, South/Product_E Aug, North/Product_B Nov, North/Product_C Dec, South/Product_D Jul]

steps.output: 8-section Word document created: Executive Summary, Key Metrics, Growth & Seasonality, Regional Performance, Product Performance, Quarterly View, Data Flags/Anomalies to Investigate, Recommendations, Appendix.
key_facts_produced: anomaly_section_title: Data Flags / Anomalies to Investigate

steps.output: Executive summary names South/Product_E Aug and Product_B volatility explicitly. Anomaly section lists all 5 outliers with z-scores. Recommendation 1 names South/Product_B March. Recommendation 5 proposes automating monthly z-score monitoring.
key_facts_produced: exec_summary: Full-year revenue 8,333,861 across 33,196 units. H2 up 7.2% vs H1. Peak Nov (749,317), trough Mar (642,741). North 35.4%, West 33.9%, South 30.6%. Product_A leads (20.1%). Two notable negative anomalies in South: Product_B in Mar and Product_E in Aug.
anomaly_narrative: March declined -3.6% vs February. Biggest negative contributor South/Product_B (-11,655 revenue, -54 units).
recommendation_1: Investigate South/Product_B March — check stock-outs, promotion rollback, channel disruption, or data capture issues.
recommendation_5: Operationalize anomaly monitoring — automate monthly z-score checks by region-product.

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Full-year revenue 8,333,861 across 33,196 units (avg 251.1/unit). H2 up 7.2% vs H1. Peak month Nov (749,317), trough Mar (642,741). North 35.4%, West 33.9%, South 30.6%. Product_A leads (20.1%). Two notable negative anomalies in South: Product_B in Mar and Product_E in Aug.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: March declined -3.6% vs February. Biggest negative contributor South/Product_B (-11,655 revenue, -54 units). Statistical outliers (|z|>=2): South/Product_E Aug z=-2.94, South/Product_B Mar z=-2.84, North/Product_C Dec z=+2.36, North/Product_B Nov z=+2.36, South/Product_D Jul z=+2.06.
